title: Sanji Chooses to Leave
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on sanji chooses to leave within the Tea Party Invitation storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: How utterly Assinine. Marriage?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And that too with a woman I've never heard of, let alone met!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: And don't think for a minute that you'll get to scoop up the straw hat pirates just like that!

dialogue.speaker: Bepo
dialogue.text: Our captain ain't the type of man that would tolerate being anyone's underlying.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Luffy's the man who will become pirate King!

dialogue.speaker: Caesar Clown
dialogue.text: And now our little talk is over. I'll let you keep Caesar. Let us go.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: There seems to be a grave misunder- standing.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: All I've done is show you your invitation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: I haven't asked for a "yes" or "no" from you at all.

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: We're inside my castle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You've already been captured!

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: You're on a one way trip to Mama as we speak.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: You probably didn't even feel it...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But we've already started moving!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: What!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: GYAAAH! They're gonna kill me! Please, let me go!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: If it's a fight you're itchin' for, be my guest.

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: Keep in mind, however, that I have complete control inside this entire castle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Kyaa AAh!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: WAAAH! Nami's sink- ing!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Nami- San!

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: Everything inside this castle bends to my whim.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Besides, even if you decide to put up a fight here,

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: You cannot escape Mama's tea party.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: every- one in the new world knows this except for you appear- entry.

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: NYORORO! RIGHT! Mama hates two things: bitter treats...

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: and tea party no- showreros!

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Those ignorant enough to ignore Mama's invitation...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Will find them- selves, the very next day, choked by regret. It's truly a pitiful sight, I'll have you knowrero!

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: A tea party invitation from Mama- Reno...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Of course, at the end of the day, whether or not you go is totally up to you.

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: After all, they say that "even the demons of hell will come when called to Mama's tea parties!"

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: is in reality nothing more than a summons order.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: But allow me to share something with you- rero.

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: Firetank pirates advisor Monster Gun*** VITC

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: Vito

summary: Sanji Chooses to Leave: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
